title: senecio cinerariae
intro: Senecio cinerariae, also known as Dusty Miller, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Canary Islands and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio cinerariae include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
